hero.description: A selective team of developers for premium clients with a vision — not a factory that takes every job. If you care about quality, clarity, and long-term results, you are in the right place.
hero.services: Website Redesign | Mobile-First | Speed & SEO | WhatsApp Integration
hero.philosophy: We say no to most inquiries — so the yes means something.

transformations.story: Their 2015 template looked outdated on phones. We rebuilt it with clear booking buttons and a modern, trustworthy design.
Slow, cluttered homepage → clean menu, hours, and click-to-call. Customers started calling from mobile within the first week.
Generic template → premium look that matches their reputation. Clear practice areas and a simple contact form.

team.name: Shubham Sunny
team.bio: I founded this studio and own technical direction on every project — architecture, code quality, and client outcomes. We scale with trusted specialists per project, not a bloated bench for show.
team.philosophy: A website should make a stranger feel confident enough to call you.

team.name: Deep Shikha
team.bio: Deep handles the rest of day-to-day delivery — QA on real devices, client kickoff calls, milestone tracking, and making sure nothing goes live until it is right.
team.philosophy: Quality is not a phase — it is the reason clients come back.

team.name: Shushma Devi
team.bio: Shushma builds and runs the people side — hiring, culture, marketing outreach, and keeping the right specialists on every project.
team.philosophy: Great delivery starts with great people — and great people need clear direction.

team.name: Vinay Thakur
team.bio: Vinay handles program management on larger builds — timelines, milestones, and mentoring developers through complex delivery.
team.philosophy: Ship on time, communicate early, and never hide bad news.
